raw_consumer_statement: I donated to XXXX XXXX on XXXX XXXX XXXX in the amount of {$100.00}, They took the XXXX and also charge {$330000.00} that same day. I called my credit card company ( Citi Bank ) and they issued another card and started an investigation The result of that investigation was that they refused to reverse the {$3300.00} charge, I have been going back and forth with this company to no avail. This charge was NOT authorized by me and I should not have to pay it.I am now receiving collection calls regarding this amount. Please help.
